root_text.an10.2:1.3: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ sīlavato sīlasampannassa avippaṭisāro uppajjati.
root_text.an10.2:1.6: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ avippaṭisārissa pāmojjaṁ jāyati.
root_text.an10.2:1.9: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ pamuditassa pīti uppajjati.
root_text.an10.2:1.12: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ pītimanassa kāyo passambhati.
root_text.an10.2:1.15: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ passaddhakāyo sukhaṁ vediyati.
root_text.an10.2:1.18: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ sukhino cittaṁ samādhiyati.
root_text.an10.2:1.21: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ samāhito yathābhūtaṁ jānāti passati.
root_text.an10.2:1.22: Yathābhūtaṁ, bhikkhave, jānato passato na cetanāya karaṇīyaṁ:
root_text.an10.2:1.24: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ yathābhūtaṁ jānaṁ passaṁ nibbindati virajjati.
root_text.an10.2:1.25: Nibbinnassa, bhikkhave, virattassa na cetanāya karaṇīyaṁ:
root_text.an10.2:1.27: Dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, yaṁ nibbinno viratto vimuttiñāṇadassanaṁ sacchikaroti.
root_text.an10.2:2.1: Iti kho, bhikkhave, nibbidāvirāgo vimuttiñāṇadassanattho vimuttiñāṇadassanānisaṁso;
root_text.an10.2:2.10: Iti kho, bhikkhave, dhammā dhamme abhisandenti, dhammā dhamme paripūrenti apārā pāraṁ gamanāyā”ti.

translation_text.an10.2:1.1: “Mendicants, an ethical person, who has fulfilled ethical conduct, need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.3: It’s only natural that an ethical person has no regrets.
translation_text.an10.2:1.4: When you have no regrets you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.6: It’s only natural that joy springs up when you have no regrets.
translation_text.an10.2:1.7: When you feel joy you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.9: It’s only natural that rapture arises when you’re joyful.
translation_text.an10.2:1.10: When your mind is full of rapture you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.12: It’s only natural that your body becomes tranquil when your mind is full of rapture.
translation_text.an10.2:1.13: When your body is tranquil you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.15: It’s only natural to feel bliss when your body is tranquil.
translation_text.an10.2:1.16: When you feel bliss you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.17: ‘May my mind be immersed in samādhi!’
translation_text.an10.2:1.18: It’s only natural for the mind to be immersed in samādhi when you feel bliss.
translation_text.an10.2:1.19: When your mind is immersed in samādhi you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.21: It’s only natural to truly know and see when your mind is immersed in samādhi.
translation_text.an10.2:1.22: When you truly know and see you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.24: It’s only natural to become disillusioned and dispassionate when you truly know and see.
translation_text.an10.2:1.25: When you’re disillusioned and dispassionate you need not make a wish:
translation_text.an10.2:1.26: ‘May I realize the knowledge and vision of freedom!’
translation_text.an10.2:1.27: It’s only natural to realize the knowledge and vision of freedom when you’re disillusioned and dispassionate.
translation_text.an10.2:2.1: And so, mendicants, the knowledge and vision of freedom is the purpose and benefit of disillusionment and dispassion.
translation_text.an10.2:2.2: Disillusionment and dispassion is the purpose and benefit of truly knowing and seeing.
translation_text.an10.2:2.3: Truly knowing and seeing is the purpose and benefit of immersion.
translation_text.an10.2:2.4: Immersion is the purpose and benefit of bliss.
translation_text.an10.2:2.5: Bliss is the purpose and benefit of tranquility.
translation_text.an10.2:2.6: Tranquility is the purpose and benefit of rapture.
translation_text.an10.2:2.7: Rapture is the purpose and benefit of joy.
translation_text.an10.2:2.8: Joy is the purpose and benefit of not having regrets.
translation_text.an10.2:2.9: Not having regrets is the purpose and benefit of skillful ethics.
translation_text.an10.2:2.10: And so, mendicants, good qualities flow on and fill up from one to the other, for going from the near shore to the far shore.”

reference_text.an10.2:1.1: bj23.6, cck24.3, csp1ed17.259, csp2ed17.259, dr24.3, ms17A10_14, msdiv2, ndp19.101, pts-vp-pli5.3, sya24.3
